input.command:
for i in $(seq 1 12); do
  COUNT=$(kubectl -n ray exec ray-head-d8695b97d-mndsl -- python -c "import ray; ray.init(); nodes = [n for n in ray.nodes() if n['Alive']]; print(len(nodes))" 2>/dev/null | tail -1)
  echo "Attempt $i: alive nodes = $COUNT"
  if [ "$COUNT" = "4" ]; then echo "Target reached!"; break; fi
  sleep 10
done
input.description: Poll until 4 alive nodes appear in Ray cluster
